entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The crop species being studied for hybrid fertility restoration.

entities.name: FERTILITY RESTORATION
entities.description: The process of regaining pollen fertility in male-sterile hybrids.

entities.name: CYTOPLASMIC-NUCLEAR MALE-STERILITY SYSTEMS
entities.description: Systems involving interaction between cytoplasm and nucleus to control male sterility.

entities.name: POSTRAINY SEASON
entities.description: The environmental period following the rainy season used for evaluating hybrid fertility.

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The environmental period during which all studied hybrids were fertile.

entities.name: A1 CYTOPLASM
entities.description: A specific cytoplasmic background used in the development of pearl millet hybrids.

entities.name: GENETIC BACKGROUND
entities.description: The genetic composition of the male-sterile lines influencing fertility restoration.

entities.name: MALE-STERILE LINES
entities.description: Plant lines that cannot produce viable pollen, used as parents in hybrid production.

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: External factors and settings that influence the expression of fertility restoration.
